response.justification: Bogdan possesses over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience, including recent work with AI-agent infrastructure and high-traffic microservices. However, he lacks the crucial domain expertise required for this Principal-level role. There is no evidence of experience architecting enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, telemetry foundations, or growth metrics frameworks, which are the core responsibilities of this position.
strengths: Over 15 years of polyglot engineering experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, C/C++, Java, and DLang.
Recent hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
Proven background in building high-scale, low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second.
concerns: Complete lack of demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, and A/B testing frameworks.
Missing background in telemetry foundations, metrics infrastructure, and statistical data analysis.
Prior roles and scope do not clearly demonstrate the enterprise-level architectural leadership expected of a Principal/IC6 engineer.
